creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Mon, 28 Feb 2011 22:49:15 GMT, mezz@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: net-p2p/transmission-gtk2 missing tray icon image
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: mezz
> State-Changed-When: Mon Feb 28 22:42:22 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why:
> I can't reproduce it. Same for coming 2.21. After looking in the 
> pkg-plist
> and I noticed that transmission.svg. It looks like you don't have 
> librsvg2
> installed? I will need to add it in the dependency.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=155119

 I do have librsvg2 installed

 Fetching 
 ftp://ftp.linux.edu.lv/mirrors/ftp.freebsd.org/ports/amd64/packages-8-stable/Latest/librsvg2.tbz... 
 Done.
 pkg_add: package 'librsvg2-2.32.1_1' or its older version already 
 installed


 Btw, I reported this bug to transmission developers (didn't receive any 
 reply yet)
 But what I also discovered is that I also don't see transmission icon 
 in about dialog.

 Here's screenshot
 http://files.bsdroot.lv/my/screenshots/transmission/2011.03.01_at_01.24.33.jpg

 What I don't understand is why is transmission-qt working fine

-- 
 Aldis Berjoza
